features.featureTitle: Add a donation section to the site-wide Footer component (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx) that displays the uploaded PayPal QR code image (stored as frontend/public/assets/generated/paypal-qr-danielle-boylan.dim_300x300.png), the name 'Danielle Boylan', a short friendly message encouraging users to support the tool (e.g. 'If this tool helped you, consider buying me a coffee ☕'), and a label reading 'Scan to donate via PayPal'. The section should appear above the existing footer content and be visually distinct but consistent with the app's design system.
